executives.name: John Kanellitsas
executives.background: Mr. Kanellitsas has over 30 years of experience in the investment banking and asset management industries. He is the Executive Vice Chairman of Lithium Americas Corp.

executives.name: Robert Gayton
executives.background: Dr. Gayton is a Chartered Professional Accountant and has directed several public mining companies.

executives.name: Steven Dean
executives.background: Mr. Dean is a Fellow of the Australasian Institute of Mining and Metallurgy and a Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Australia. He was formerly the Chairman and CEO of Atlantic Gold Corporation and President of Teck Resources Ltd.
